response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performer in the video as Momosuzu Nene from on-screen text (#桃鈴ねね誕生日ライブ2026). 2. Recognized the song title as 'Liminal' from the on-screen text. 3. Searched for 'Momosuzu Nene Liminal lyrics' to confirm the song and obtain the lyrics. 4. Confirmed it is an original song by the performer. 5. Mapped the entire video duration (00:00 - 02:07) as a single scene. 6. Formatted the output into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video features a live performance of the song "Liminal" by VTuber Momosuzu Nene during her 2026 birthday live stream. The performance is the entirety of the video content.

scenes.description: Momosuzu Nene performs her song "Liminal" on stage. She sings and dances throughout the entire video segment.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Verse 1]
見つめるくすんだ瞳で
光を探して迷ってた
いくつもの痛みに
縛られたまま頬を伝う

[Verse 2]
画面に映る私はどうして
涙の跡が消されているんだろ
罅割れた硝子の向こう笑って繕っていた
誰かがいた

[Pre-Chorus]
「偽物みたいだ」「ただの影だ」って
決め付けたけど
まやかしじゃなくて私が私でいる理由を
君の笑顔に貰っていた

[Chorus]
そうさ画面の中隠せない消えない見えない
それでもそれでも私は
君の光を追って閉じこもる暗い硝子の曇りを払って
今明日を見つけたんだ
忘れたくない君がくれたこの感情を

[Verse 3]
見つめる姿鏡の奥の
涙の跡は見せられないけど
磨かれた硝子の向こう
笑って輝いていたいだけで

[Pre-Chorus]
「誰のためだっけ？」
声が姿が誰でもない気がした

[Chorus]
「孤独だ」ってまた迷い出す画面の奥の歪みを
いつでもいつでも君は
映す光の中に名もない私の声を見つけてくれてた
ずっと

[Guitar Solo]

[Bridge]
「この声も、姿も、紛れもない私だ」
「ありのままでいいんだ」「この気持ちは本物だ」
縛られても触れられなくても
君が示してくれてたから

[Interlude]
いつかこの「私」で
ずっと光を手繰って
きっと見つけ出す誰でもない「君」に会えるまで
境界線はすぐそこに

[Chorus]
そうさ画面の向こう繋ぎたい越えたい触れたい
それこそそれこそ私なんだ
君と光になって未だ遮る硝子の壁の先まで
届くように笑っていたい
迷いはない君がくれたこの感情と
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Verse 1]
Staring with dull eyes
I was lost, searching for light
Bound by many pains
It runs down my cheeks

[Verse 2]
Why are the traces of tears erased
On the me reflected on the screen?
Behind the cracked glass, I was smiling and faking it
Someone was there

[Pre-Chorus]
I decided it was "fake" and "just a shadow"
But it wasn't a deception, the reason I am me
I received it from your smile

[Chorus]
That's right, inside the screen, I can't hide it, it won't disappear, it can't be seen
Even so, even so, I
Chase your light, wiping away the fog on the dark glass I was shut in
Now I've found tomorrow
I don't want to forget this feeling you gave me

[Verse 3]
Looking at my reflection in the back of the mirror
I can't show the traces of tears
Beyond the polished glass
I just want to smile and shine

[Pre-Chorus]
"Who was this for again?"
I felt like the voice and the figure were no one

[Chorus]
"I'm lonely," I start to get lost again, the distortion deep in the screen
Always, always you
Found my nameless voice within the light reflected
Always

[Guitar Solo]

[Bridge]
"This voice, this figure, is the real me without a doubt"
"It's okay to be as I am." "This feeling is real"
Even if I'm bound, even if I can't be touched
Because you showed me

[Interlude]
Someday with this "me"
Always following the light
Surely, I will find you, until I can meet the "you" that is no one
The boundary line is right there

[Chorus]
That's right, beyond the screen, I want to connect, I want to overcome, I want to touch
That is exactly, that is exactly what I am
Becoming light with you, until beyond the glass wall that still obstructs
I want to smile so it reaches you
I have no hesitation, with this emotion you gave me
